[{"Name":"Chris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVrhDhDlU3GI3fmzCVuFaIkZ4IKy9JZKNjc5ari7K5jjaVCXB4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

I had a great experience at Phuket Dental Signature Clinic. I came in for a professional teeth cleaning and repair of two chipped front teeth.

The cleaning was done perfectly, and the repair work was excellent. I’m writing this review two months later, and my teeth are still in perfect condition. Even though the material used to repair chipped teeth can sometimes be fragile, everything is holding up beautifully.

The dentist and staff were super nice, professional, and made me feel very comfortable throughout the visit. I’m very happy with the results and truly appreciate the care and skill of the team.

Highly recommended. Staff and doctor are very good. I would recommend this clinic and come back again","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Y T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKlLmaXVSWuZPgplXKY7EVfdp6KpxFC-yOVPb94TU7gc6oJYfk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had a terrible experience at this clinic and would not recommend it to anyone. I had three sessions of pico laser here, which cost 30K. Now, one and a half months after the treatments, there are still more than 10 pea-sized hard bumps on my face, caused by the injections they gave immediately after pico laser. My skin condition is now much worse than before, and this has caused me severe stress.

First, they never explained what was in the injection before the treatment and clearly weren’t aware of the damage it would cause. When I asked, the nurses only vaguely described it as a “vitamin cocktail,” and the injection was done while my eyes were covered. The bumps developed exactly where those injections were given.

Yet this was not even the worst part. What’s truly alarming is how the doctor handled the situation afterwards. When I first pointed out the bumps (fibrosis) and asked for a solution, she only offered mild laser treatments, which did not help even after repeated visits. When I suggested steroid injections, she rejected the idea and insisted the bumps would gradually subside on their own.

One month later, the bumps were still there and had grown even bigger. Only then did she finally agree to inject steroids — but only in the spots she personally thought looked “obvious.” She refused to treat the other areas that clearly had the same issue, insisting they would “disappear” on their own. Even after seeing that the steroid worked, she still refused to treat all the bumps, leaving several areas swollen.

The doctor’s injections caused severe inflammation, yet she refused to provide proper treatment, relied blindly on laser for issues clearly beyond its scope, and missed the best window for recovery. Her arrogance and ignorance outweighed any genuine care for her clients. After all the stress they caused with their own errors, they didn’t bother to apologize and even stopped responding to client messages, which is why I’m sharing my experience here.

Pico laser requires a lot of aftercare. I avoided outdoor activities for months, wore sunscreen and a mask every time I went out, and took every precaution to protect my skin. And still, this is the result I was left with. Be careful before you invest your time and money into skin treatments here, when the service provider is unprofessional, all of your efforts can be completely wasted by their malpractice and mistakes.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lERt4MeoYSColy6AqX_nw5C4C8e7Pz7tI81gye-99ckkioaRjmlbGNra2rBTMu-p-evucniCKtWlHFcoG0SRU-w1rpRhugd1cOZlK9U8Om1oOAUStPDkrvH0fskpYVzcTimZs7pHqHIYnsU"],"When":"2025-9-10"},{"Name":"Shanu Singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJvSVgdoLlOKSxNWlaalahG4fvA2BIjaM0GMJuQDmYFIrYZnw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently visited Laser Premium Clinic in Phuket and had an incredible experience. I opted for both the CO2 laser and Pico laser treatments, and the results have truly exceeded my expectations.

From the moment I entered the clinic, I was impressed by the elegant and calming atmosphere. The staff were professional, friendly, and very attentive to my needs. They took the time to explain the procedures thoroughly, answered all my questions patiently, and made me feel completely at ease.

The treatments themselves were done with utmost care and precision. The equipment was modern and hygienic, and I could feel that I was in expert hands. After just one session, I noticed remarkable improvement in my skin — smoother texture, reduced pigmentation, and a radiant glow that I couldn’t stop admiring.

What stood out most was the staff’s dedication to ensuring my comfort during and after the treatment. They followed up with aftercare instructions and even checked in on my progress, which I deeply appreciated.

If you are looking for high-quality laser treatments with visible, lasting results, I highly recommend Laser Premium Clinic in Phuket. Their expertise, hospitality, and results make them truly deserving of the name "Premium."

I’m beyond satisfied with my experience and will definitely return for future treatments. Don’t hesitate — your skin deserves this level of care!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Zola Alessandra Marracino","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLUd2dLknDzdlpfdLAqWmtzwTZQR2McqxpiOJIC3k7bK6iFkA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great experience having co2 laser here. Friendly and accommodating staff. I highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Polina Kovaleva","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0mNvvg5ps0e_zFXQfVts8T1cd_WEKVunuD1cgNnynUeDnHhdWnQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I couldn’t be happier with my experience—this incredible doctor gave me the perfect smile I’ve always dreamed of. The clinic itself is beautiful, with a warm and welcoming team that made me feel at home from the moment I walked in. I will be planning to return to Thailand just to relive this amazing care.

My dentist truly has the golden hands of a surgeon. I didn’t even feel the anesthesia being injected, and every step of the procedure was flawless. The entire team worked in perfect harmony—six hands at once, ensuring I was completely comfortable and that every detail was handled with precision.

The call center was also exceptional—they made sure all my requests were taken care of, and I received every appointment and service right on time. Their coordination was seamless and reassuring. Before my travel I spoke to the team though email and they made sure to analyze pictures I sent and consult with doctor and provide prices for me.

I left absolutely thrilled, smiling confidently with results that exceeded my expectations. They even provided me with a night guard that I adore—it’s incredibly comfortable and fits like a dream. And of course the prices are great , they did not charge me for anything extra and even gave me additional things for the aftercare.

If you’re considering dental travel and still on the fence, don’t hesitate. The professionalism here is unmatched. This clinic is fast, highly skilled, and genuinely exceptional. I’m beyond grateful for the care I received. Thank you Sea Smile Team !!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Peter Fagan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ-rEiEUo497supwt7irUNMVurpUktEokbex_2BZYzOI5qRpw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We have been coming here for 12 years and the dental team are truely remarkable. Usually very good service but not this time.  I had an allergic reaction to an antibiotic in a face cream I was given for skin condition to clear up a skin problem.  It was a systemic reaction which started to effect my whole body.  Hundreds of red bumps beginning at my hair line on day.  I called several times and sent in pictures.  No response the 1st day.  Second day I called 4 times  early in the morning and was told someone would call me that day.  The rash had moved down my face to my neck and onto my chest.  My mouth was starting to swell.  Reaction like this can effect your breathing in which case you will in up in the Emergency Room. Not good.  I was in Tucson and called their Tucson Office.  Diana was great!  She knew I needed a cortisone shot.   She got me in and I got the shot of cortisone from Jessica who was very good.  Tucson office was excellent!  I understand training of the new front office staff is under way.  Audrey Eskue","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lulu Gamo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWdejCg-n5sjfnBouIvUer9GfVQHI5bJaHFD8bkwiyfIpx0Oify=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"At first, the front desk was very welcoming and all smiles. The male receptionist gave a smirk smile. The other staff (female) overhead our conversation and she approached me and gave me 5 band aids. (The other staff are accommodating and not skimpy)

Another is, when she called to inform me the result, for me it sounded serious and something to worry about to think its not. She should be trained to be subtle and sensitive when dealing with patients.

When he entered the exam room, he introduced himself but never asked my wife how she was doing or how he could help. Instead, he was condescending and dismissive, and talked more about his career and his speciality.

My wife has severe anxiety triggered by medical appointments due to the substandard medical care here in Arizona.  This was exacerbated by how she was cut off by Dr. Weyer each time she had a question or comment. He accused my wife of constantly  interrupting, and gave me the impression that he was more concerned on telling my wife what he doesn't treat rather than discussing her dermatology issue.  It was to the point of us (particularly my wife) feeling verbally attacked.  We left immediately, as it seemed like he was actively instigating and trying to get an outburst from my wife. As we left, even the receptionist came off as rude, yelling after us that we needed to check out as we were exiting the exam area.  This experience resulted in my wife having an anxiety attack as soon as we got to the car.

My wife was not disruptive in any way.  Dr. Weyer would cut her off every time she tried to ask a question or comment about what she discovered when doing her own research on her dermatological condition.  Dr. Weyer gave the impression that the information that my wife had was insignificant. He would literally shrug his shoulders and throw up his hands as if there was nothing he could do.

My wife felt both humiliated and attacked. It’s now been over four years since my first visit with Dr. Potchara, and I still consider him my personal doctor and one of the best in the industry.

Even after moving to Bangkok more than a year ago, I continue to make the trip back to see him — that’s how much I trust his expertise and artistry. He’s not only incredibly professional and precise but also truly cares about his patients. His understanding of facial balance and natural aesthetics is remarkable.

Over the years, I’ve brought my partner, friends, and even my mother and mother-in-law here for treatments — and if that doesn’t say trust, I don’t know what does. Every visit has reaffirmed why Dr. Potchara remains the one I trust most, consistently delivering results that feel natural, balanced, and refined.

I’m deeply grateful for his care and integrity through the years. 🙏✨ Highly recommended to anyone seeking genuine artistry in aesthetic medicine.

Chrystal does beautiful work and you will be amazed at the freedom of not having to draw eyebrows on every day.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Karen Mincolla","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUyroL4GneCluCHXsAQz9zYtcTTFXJjq6lC5vjwnWEUswJK8QiByA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Chrystal is an artist! Chrystal sources high quality pigments for her brow make-up. She is knowledgeable about her craft and it is clear she cares about setting the highest standard in her industry.

Great work Chrystal ,thank you!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pily Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI55NgQCq0O3RZacJY_J606k3rMiaNIhlHaSEJzXoXMyChBqw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can’t recommend Chrystal enough! I found her on TikTok and decided to book an appointment for lip filler and Botox, and I’m so glad I did. From start to finish she made me feel comfortable and cared for. She took her time explaining everything, answered all my questions, and made sure I felt completely at ease the whole time. I kept telling her I’ve never had such an incredible experience at a med spa before. She’s that good!

My results turned out so perfect, super natural and exactly what I wanted. The whole vibe with Taylor was fun and relaxing, and you can tell she genuinely loves what she does and truly cares about her clients.

I live up in North Scottsdale and she’s in Gilbert, but she is 100% worth the drive. I’ll happily make the trip every time because I’ve officially found my go-to injector!","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETeDfbTA52Lb9sGZ-mLK5CspgE4UjPJBKQAVn--fvbgNacroJI7Sv-Mt58x5buk4HokC399JzHEGfA--PKD6KTrkJsSAkrx8iVH39CnbfkhxGmuggcCV1izhL8aNebVI4lk63AWPcBevIZL"],"When":"2025-10-31"},{"Name":"Miranda M. Moore","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWYuEjNXO7Wh6nYeUVqXUUech9b9yJdbqGMCr-R-2myHHH2rXZN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had such a great first experience at Honor Aesthetics and I’m so happy I chose them.

I came in because I’ve always been self-conscious about deeper lines in my forehead. They talked through multiple options with me and never once made me feel like I needed to do anything — they were very reassuring and focused on keeping results natural while still addressing my concerns.

I saw Taylor W and she was fantastic. During my consultation she explained the different treatments and helped me decide what would work best for my face, and I ended up doing Dysport based on her recommendation. I felt informed, not pressured.

Since it was my first time I was a little (okay, very) nervous, but the appointment was super quick and basically painless with no bruising or discomfort afterward. About two weeks later my results looked great, but one eyebrow/forehead side was slightly stronger than the other, so I came back in and she did a complimentary touch-up to balance everything perfectly.

My results look incredibly natural — I still have movement in my forehead and eyebrows and still look like myself, just more awake and refreshed with smoother skin. Nothing frozen or overdone at all.

The office itself is also wonderful — the front desk staff and the owner Allie are very friendly, the space is clean and beautiful, and scheduling has been flexible around my work schedule. Pricing felt very fair for the area.

I’m really happy with my results and overall experience and would absolutely recommend Honor Aesthetics!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shelby King","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIWAICJbd40ZhS5YH9XXdrqo90s7-DkCVH0fR7XmF9H2z1M0Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I originally found Taylor through a model call on TikTok, and I’m so glad I did. I’ve been to several med spas in the Valley and even in California, but the experience here has been completely different in the best way. Instead of rushing for quick, dramatic results, they truly take the time to assess your anatomy and recommend treatments that will look natural and last long term.

I go here for lip filler and every appointment has been amazing. They listen to what I want, explain their approach, and make sure the results fit my face rather than following a one-size-fits-all trend.

I live about 45 minutes away, but the drive is absolutely worth it because I know I’m going to get thoughtful care and the best possible results every time. I would recommend this place again and again without hesitation!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Madeline McGowan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIEqqJ1V7BDRWrLqcaNIqFsNho8d4ml_2XqMHCWhxmdvb3uVQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Have had the best experience at Honor Aesthetics and Welness and Allie! They have been so welcoming. They’ve taken the time to really educate me on their services what would be best for me without any sort of pushyness to get anything done. I am going back for my third appointment next week and will continue my services and I have already recommended to multiple friends.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Samantha Clement","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWxrCu_cYi5voubsVuleHdl5wMslP0XhGneKyXThIEruG52Ov8u=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Yesterday was my first visit and I’ll never go anywhere else!! They are located in Chandler/Gilbert which a hour drive from my house. SO WORTH IT!!

The team is INCREDIBLE. From the moment I walked in I was greeted by everyone who was at the front counter: They made me feel incredibly welcome. I had a Botox and filler consultation with Tay.

The thing that stood out to me most is before we started the consult, Tay handed me a mirror and asked me to point out the things I love about my face!! It was such a gentle reminder that we are all there to enhance some areas we may struggle with confidence in but to find the beauty in what we have already as well.

She listened to all my concerns, explained all my options, and gave me her suggestions but was NEVER pushy. Even once told me “and seriously you could do none of it at all, and that’s totally okay too!”

I went ahead and decided on some Botox and cheek filler and the injection experience and results are literally 10/10!! So natural, and exactly what I wanted! Her and Allie tag teamed my cheeks so that we did not run out of time and seriously it was incredible. The whole team is amazing! I already have my next few appointments and procedures scheduled and I’m so excited!

I’ve already recommended them to my sisters and my girlfriends because it was just that good!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rachel “RB” Broce","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYaC31iiPY_Ic0o_USgPrXz25tOQTDNCuMfj_Ov1V6d9BhCrQPow=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a dreamy experience! Allie provides the most patient-centered, customized experience money can buy. She is incredibly kind, compassionate, and never pushy—just pure expertise. If you want to feel seen and pampered, these women are it!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Melissa Vasquez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocINtafmH42OiigLtX0XBKvX7U0ov1LgSo-5jAo4FuxQb6erCg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nurse Allie was absolutely AMAZING. She asked about my likes and dislikes, listened carefully, and made thoughtful recommendations based on what she truly felt would look best for my face, not just a one size fits all approach.

Her energy was so warm and personable, it instantly put me at ease. I felt completely heard, cared for, and confident in her expertise. I loved both the experience and her work, and I can’t recommend her enough! 💕💕💕💕","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bella Noli","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXbc1burRC9aS4LbxP37w1I-BzeMylr8mPDvf-RGjKvlyu0fSk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Taylor at Honor Aesthetics is truly amazing! She’s incredibly talented, especially when it comes to lips. She gave me the most beautiful, natural-looking results. I love how she takes her time to get to know you personally, listens carefully to what you want (and don’t want!), and tailors everything to enhance your natural features. Her attention to detail and gentle approach made me feel completely comfortable and confident throughout the entire process.

Every visit to Honor Aesthetics has been such a positive experience. The entire team is warm, welcoming, and professional. It feels like walking into a space full of genuine people who truly care about their clients. He was very kind and listened to my concerns and explained the different options that are available for me for treatment. I highly recommend taking time out and making an appointment for yourself. Thank you Jason for your help today. I appreciate it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Faeryn Muhammad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUNvaA7CqVLCrUUrLVhUUiQVLYMbUwvJt5rxXhJiNHXR2e0QtQC=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I hardly ever write reviews, but this one simply cannot be ignored. First off this is nothing to do with the actual doctor but rather the people behind the front desk. Specifically Alexis and Daisy. These two should not be allowed to work with the public but especially with clients and patients within the medical field. These two individuals lack empathy and compassion. For starters, I fully understand policies and being late. I was 8-10 minutes late to my appointment due to traffic. As a chronically ill person and with someone with ADHD, I am very anal about timing. I am normally the patient that arrives 30-40 minutes EARLY purely due to my anxiety and fears surrounding being late. However, today was a very overwhelming and stressful day and to be told I cannot be seen quite literally brought me to tears and I was really upset and frustrated. As I am suffering from an outbreak of some type of fungal skin infection with no real help or relief. I had previously went to urgent care, even was prescribed medication and creams. Its been 5 days since I visited urgent care and taken medications and it seems to only be getting worse, and multiplying. Nothing has been helping so I was desperately hoping to get some sort of relief and answers. Only to be met with Alexis telling me coldly that I cannot be seen due to not being there 15 minutes prior to appointment time. To which was the first time I heard of the policy. It was not emailed to me, nor texted. The only thing that was sent was a link to check in and fill out paperwork, however that link was broken and wouldn't let me copy and paste it into the app. So I couldn't go in or sign in at all. Which is incredibly frustrating and anxiety inducing. I understand policies, however, there are more kind and compassionate ways to go about it. Especially when someone like me who is chronically ill and has multiple symptoms and flares happening all at once with no real answers as to why or what is causing your symptoms and pain. Its scary, overwhelming, and exhausting. And Alexis and Daisy specifically made me feel like complete shit if I'm being honest for desperately wanting help and answers to my concerns. And Alexis specifically said to me on the way out the door \"well should've been here earlier\" in a tone that can only be described as when a mean girl at school bullies someone. And hearing that made me cry. And made me feel like shit and worthless. Im only someone who desperately wanted answers and a solution to my suffering and I was met with the most unkind and un-empathic individuals. Who didn't care to try to get me in sooner. To which their next availability wasn't until March 17th. How the hell am I supposed to wait 2 weeks to get seen for an issue that is causing me active pain and needs immediate treatment and intervention? Especially when going to urgent care did NOT solve the issue. I will not be coming back here. And I wish Alexis and Daisy would re-think how they treat people. Especially people with disabilities and are chronically ill and just need answers. Treat people with respect, compassion, and empathy.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tami Hagge","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLC9VD1IirjgGnxJSwRUrPvIc9LK4_EyVH0NYfmUbXgOahFSA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The overall experience was great. [{"Name":"Sierra Torres","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIf71qgyPBSSxpsI2wjOrCcL7c2BE8ISL4HGFrWAURf80GSYqc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My experience with Jaime was truly refreshing from start to finish. She provides an exclusive and private setting that immediately makes you feel comfortable and cared for.

Jaime is extremely professional and attentive. She followed all necessary sanitary precautions with precision, which gave me full confidence in her practice. She also ensured that my treated areas were properly numbed before beginning, making the process much more comfortable than I anticipated.

Beyond her technical skill, she is engaging, kind, and genuinely present with her clients. She takes the time to listen and makes you feel seen rather than rushed.

I highly recommend Jaime to anyone seeking high-quality aesthetic care delivered with both expertise and warmth.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Laura Rolón","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW_Q6Lmu8Kx8vp_hxmY1myKYmT91xtV3tI1FNk5YxD4nzlKb-Yw-A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently went to Rise Aesthetics for my first-time ever getting lip fillers (or any injections!), and I cannot recommend Jaime enough. From the initial consultation, I felt completely confident in her expertise. She truly had my best interests at heart and was very realistic about what we could achieve, which built a lot of trust right away.

During the actual appointment, Jaime was able to calm my nerves. She created such a soothing environment and walked me through every single step of the process so there were no surprises. For my first time, the experience was seamless and amazing. I’m so happy with the results and I’m already looking forward to going back to continue working with her!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stephanie Crites","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI2EcP4ZhOLbNfXnorS0ZNkW1MJJ-dWilqvgThdl3g52C1jv6Qg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My experience with Jamie has been 5 stars! 10, if I could rate that. She truly has a gift for understanding facial features and knows exactly how to approach it for a natural, refreshed appearance. I am Asian and had troubles in the past with other injectors not understanding my facial anatomy and not loving the results. Completely different with Jamie and I never knew I could look this good! Highly recommend!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ariana Yvette","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUexnuiqChbe4EIuP9UNjFTa0O3nZy2pMRczZ059Z_eidZna_Lv=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jamie is absolutely amazing! She has such a great personality and made me feel so comfortable and welcomed from the moment I walked in. She took her time explaining everything in detail, answered all my questions, and really put me at ease throughout the entire process. The injections were smooth, and she is truly an expert at what she does. I’m already loving my results and would 100% recommend Jamie to anyone thinking about getting injections!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Christi Bowker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUv-55PMNk7yJY7RdVJIR1RhK5L80R_5vstG923-GY-5_P0r08=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I found Jamie through IG after following someone that went to her for lip filler and whose results looked incredible. I had a virtual zoom prior to scheduling my appointment where we discussed some other concerns I wanted to possibly address as well. Jamie was honest with her recommendations based on my age and my concerns, which I greatly appreciated. So I scheduled my lip filler appointment and couldn’t be happier with the results. First of all she is so kind, knowledgeable and her goal is to give you natural results. Exactly what I was hoping for. Her office is so peaceful and relaxing which is important when you’re getting poked! I would highly recommend Jamie and will definitely be going back for other treatments. Thanks Jamie!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Garrett Rudkin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIvV7VE5zKmqOvYwusN2q9uEhyyJDkKmfSn3TMzPzndQJCLrw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had such a great experience with Jamie at Rise Aesthetics. I went in wanting a more balanced face, specifically asking about cheek filler, and she was incredibly thorough from start to finish. She took the time to explain exactly what I did and didn’t need, which I really appreciated.

Jamie’s consultation style is thoughtful and honest — she truly wants you to look like the most authentic version of yourself, not overdone or fake. The entire process was seamless, and she was so wonderful to work with. I felt informed, comfortable, and completely confident in her care.

I would highly recommend Jamie to anyone and will definitely be going back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nia Reid","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9NJEx8OVGf6_UslCET34SQuuSZjl1wVOipOppBcEcGax8RM9v=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had facial balancing done and I can honestly say it was one of the best decisions I’ve made. My results are exactly what I hoped for. I look refreshed, lifted, and natural. I still look like myself, just about ten years younger. Nothing looks overdone or obvious. The results are subtle in the best way.

What impressed me most was the technician’s skill. She truly knew exactly what to do to enhance my features without changing them. Her eye for balance and proportion is exceptional. You can tell she understands facial anatomy and aesthetics on a deep level.

She also made the entire experience comfortable and enjoyable. She is quirky and funny, which immediately put me at ease, but she is also incredibly professional and confident in her work. That combination is rare.

If you are considering facial balancing and want results that look natural, refined, and beautifully done, I highly recommend her. I absolutely love my results.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nichole Williscroft","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUCoZxMxoYj4AYM6p0LsOh2IdSUBbDHiYIX0rtzz5wozPSTPLTf=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a great experience with Jamie at Rise Aesthetics. I went in for microneedling with PRP, and everything was smooth and well-organized from start to finish. I was checked in promptly, numbed comfortably, had my blood drawn, and then we moved right into the microneedling. Jamie was knowledgeable, efficient, and made the whole process feel easy and reassuring. I’m excited to see my results over the next few days and would absolutely recommend her.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Shania Brenon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKPMA5tU8NuE98vgwS02N4M9OQQ2h9hTEU8tRJruGwT4FRgsSI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the most incredible experience with Dr. Prucz and his team at Phoenix Plastic Surgery! From my first consultation to now being 2 weeks post-op, they have been nothing but attentive, kind, and informative. I have never had sugery before, so I was very nervous. They kept me calm and made me feel so comfortable throughout the entire process.

The procedure I received was a Breast Augmentation. I had a bit of off-balance prior, Dr. Prucz went with two different sizes to even it out. He also expressed to me that he was deciding between 8 different sizes during the procedure. His attention to detail and perfection is what made my outcome so outstanding.

I could not be happier with my results. Dr. Prucz and his team did everything I wanted and more. It was hard to envision myself post-op but they took their time and were incredibly patient with me as I tried to describe what I wanted. I can’t even begin to express how comfortable they made me feel. It truly makes such a big difference! The women on his team helped me tremendously, especially with all the emotions and nerves that come with surgery.

I feel so confident and I could not recommend Dr. Prucz enough! You are in such great hands!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"strephanie Lewis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKBhAAZmHmd3klan_DSPXhYspEL0b8uNe3xDCJiS2SImbTW=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The entire experience with this office has been first class.  The surgery went great with no bruising afterwards.  I could go out in public a week later-I was thinking 4-6 weeks with bruising.  I am at 5 weeks and no scaring.  Couldn’t be more pleased.  Big thank you to Dr. Pricz, Dani, and Ali who all went way beyond what they needed to.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"L Babu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXChP_OXJ6fKwDCzp6eTYLoQ7F3DPBQxcfxnlI9F_nbLRSZOM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As a physician myself, I asked many of my colleagues who they would recommend if they needed surgery, and Dr. Prucz was the name that came up most often—without hesitation. After working with him, I completely understand why. He’s exceptionally skilled, meticulous, and truly cares about his patients. He takes time to explain everything clearly, listens with compassion, and has a calm, reassuring presence that instantly builds trust. His entire team reflects that same level of professionalism and kindness. I’m so grateful to have found Dr. Prucz and can’t recommend him and his staff highly enough.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Scott Krebsbach [Northwest CTA]","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXI-KeGmIz-f1SCYf0nCzGiTvzt3phjRMcHWeiEK0owI1TqmHFZ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Prucz and his staff are very professional and attentive! They are friendly and warm in reception and have always been patient answering questions.  My surgery was a tummy tuck with some liposuction under the arms and along the side of my torso.  I am feeling great and looking better, which is what i hoped for.  It does take time to fully heal, so patience is required.
I've had a great experience with them and hope to return for another procedure in the near future. Highly recommend and 5 stars out of 5 for my experience!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alicia Martinez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWFwDbb9RqJtMseDnA4Q0d7XMvG5ArfXqVyU5Rv6IRfBZQNtgg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From my first phone call to get things started to my consultation, surgery, and post-op visits, all of Dr. Prucz team, including the doc himself, were amazing! You need a team like this when going through such a major procedure and change in your Life. Everyone is so friendly, welcoming, supportive and encouraging. Thank you all so much! I cannot wait to see my final results when I am 100% healed…..so far, so good!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"GIL","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJEy7c-Q7ZkJkkMj_iT6EBkzSbQEP_BwxzrpIxe6skzVpAvZg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My experience with Dr. Prucz and his team has been nothing short of excellent. After putting off gynecomastia surgery for most of my life, I was pretty nervous to finally take the plunge.

From the first consultation, Dr. Prucz and Allie (his Practice Manager) immediately put me at ease. They patiently answered all of my questions and showed genuine empathy throughout the process. Dr. Prucz's calm demeanor and impressive background gave me complete confidence in choosing him as my surgeon.

I'm incredibly glad that I did. My results have exceeded my expectations, and I'm amazed by how minimal my discomfort has been. Dani provided excellent care at each follow up visit, and my healing has been smooth and complication free. I'm just over four weeks into the recovery process and very happy with my progress. I can't wait to see how things shape up in the months ahead.

Dr. Prucz, I'm sure that for you it was just another Monday, but for me, you erased more than 25 years of insecurity. Thank you for the work that you do, it makes a huge difference.

If you're considering gynecomastia surgery, choose Dr. Prucz with absolute confidence.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Norma Santiago","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL5LAYmHFA0ru4wukw6mQc-pA7cOVGjV0BwXB0mkFvZqWhuSg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Prucz Thank You, Thank You!  I had an upper and lower Eyelid Blepharoplasty and my eyes are beautiful. When I first went to see Dr. Prucz  I was greeted with his beautiful staff they were so kind and made me feel very comfortable. They were always there when I had any questions. Dr. Prucz is a kind, caring and warm Dr. who makes you feel comfortable the moment you meet him. He is truly gifted in what he does. I can not say how happy and beautiful my eyes are now. Thank you again Dr. Prucz I will be back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rachel Geiser","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocII9GCLMT_5eqg_Iy5YMJ7EA83VxNeoVvQ6La2uOqryYNp1LQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had diastasis recti repair performed by Dr. Prucz and couldn’t be more pleased with my experience so far. Every time my family and I are in the office, we are greeted warmly and treated so well by every single member of the staff that we’ve encountered. Allie, Dani, Meghan, and Paige are all wonderful people and are so easy to talk to, you’d think you’ve known them forever. Dr. Prucz is a breath of fresh air when it comes to surgeon personalities, as well as bedside manner. He’s confident without being arrogant and follows through on what he says he will do, while also being personable and relatable. He answers questions without dismissing worries and/or concerns. He was the only consultation I attended for my procedure because I knew after consulting with him that he was the right choice to handle my diastasis repair and aftercare. I highly recommend this practice. ❤️

Edit to add: They take care of their veteran patients very well!","Images":null,"When":""}]

You will feel completely relaxed and know your back has been cleaned and moisturized completely.

The owner Martha is very knowledgeable about skin and will recommend treatments best for your skin type.  Turn Back Time offers many services that will result  in your skin looking its very best, including removing  brown spots to wrinkles etc.

never pressured or intimidated like I thought it would be at a Scottsdale location.  I turned 75 this past March, and told myself this was just for me. I was tired of the fine lines around my lips and the deeper lines that I thought I would have forever!  The  young ladies make me feel like a friend and that is partly why I am still a very happy 75 year old  client with much fewer wrinkles with very pretty and very professional ladies working on me! I'm not sure when I will be done !  I'm having too much fun looking and feeling younger! Thanks TBT !","Images":null,"When":""}]

I would love to recommend her to anyone, who needs care of a personal nature. I feel that she did her best &  she was very informative. I look forward to seeing her again. Linda M. Shearer 😄💯","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ian C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXH3NdHqqFRbSx43JteFRBAHspXRbaZ18FVmEr2oxjnxXoAkcW3GA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I've been a patient of Advanced Derm's Phx office for 10+ years, seeing the same doc that entire time. Recently, the office called the day before my appointment (scheduled 6 months in advance) to cancel.  I get it, things come up for docs, just like they do for patients. However, I was told the next available appt. was in 2.5 months.  Again, I get it, my doc is popular and his schedule is limited -- But putting me at the very back of the line after canceling me the day before is unacceptable. Shouldn't the appts that got canceled be given special attention to get them in ASAP? A special waitlist perhaps?  When I pointed out the unfairness of how I was being treated, the Office Manager disagreed and said they don't make waitlists and that I could "make an appt. with a different doc".  Honestly, I get treated better at the U.S. Post Office.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tony Silva","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV3lQNn6o5TgKwzWl_K7IJbsxOPNhPctA9hilbbvTSKDshvZVbl=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Everyone was welcoming and courteous. Overall a great place to visit.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Phil Case","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLMbNWcb8K-oOGEZheVWtbl_A53aSwnvekmEefRwf8U2s3i2g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The team at Advanced Dermatology was very professional and efficient. He is a good listener and seems to value a patient’s perspective. Overall, I had a very positive experience at my first dermatology appointment.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"VoiceDancer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK8go8eNobAgF_Swl9Cd33XTY1_uwv7f3fiCD2-JKXOiTa_0g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best interaction with a physician I’ve ever had. Check out was friendly and quick.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dani Renee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXg6czz9N0ROjb3kCo2JA0l3WeyEbzMWKLtPkj5YLgMDG-GtvnYfw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I’m not surprised at recent unhappy reviews. I have been a patient here for a few years, however the past two appointments I’ve had were a great disappointment.

The doctors and doctor support staff are wonderful. Operations are TERRIBLE. It seems like they book up to 10 or so appointments in increments, so everyone gets called in at once. You wait in a packed waiting room and get shuffled in at once. The problem is, if one person runs late, it messes everyone’s appointments.

I have waited 30 minutes after my appointment time twice now, didn’t even see my doctor either time. I had to leave because I had other things to do. The way things are scheduled and operationally handled are disrespectful to the patients that go here. They need to figure it out because this will cause patients to leave.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Josh S.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXzT5QjZJXOwKFB8RBYLieN-kmRG5VF7r86mIhikL98WrnzXiyI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been going to this clinic for about 10 years. Advanced derm, please take care of her and make sure she sticks around :-)","Images":null,"When":""}]
